question: Will there be a red card in the 2026 UEFA Champions League final?
textDescription: Resolves YES if any player, substitute, or team official listed on the official team sheet is shown a red card (including a second yellow card resulting in dismissal) during the official match, as recorded in the official match report; otherwise NO.
newsShortReason: UEFA's disciplinary records show a low incidence of red cards in recent finals.
newsKeyEvidence: The 2025 final between Paris Saint-Germain and Inter Milan had no red cards. | UEFA's all-time statistics indicate that only a few players have received multiple red cards in Champions League finals. | The 2026 final between Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal is scheduled for May 30, 2026, with no red cards reported in recent matches.
